text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki encounters a younger student who is
upset about her own distance aptitude. Fuji
Kiseki decides to encourage her with a miracle.

I understand how she feels and can now decide
between continuing the Classic Triple Crown tour
or starting the mile tour. The best path for her is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This makes our next race the Japanese Derby.

Fuji Kiseki decides to tackle her inaptitude for
longer races head-on and forges ahead with the
Classic Triple Crown tour.

When she announces her lack of affinity for long
races, the public is shocked, but her fans'
expectations don't wane in the slightest.

In order to show her younger schoolmate a
miracle, Fuji Kiseki aims for the Japanese Derby.
This is the beginning of a very difficult challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This makes our next race the NHK Mile Cup.

Fuji Kiseki sets her sights for the top and forges
ahead with the mile tour.

The public is shocked when she announces her
sudden agenda change, but her fans'
expectations don't wane in the slightest.

In order to show her younger schoolmate a
miracle, Fuji Kiseki aims for the NHK Mile Cup.
This is the beginning of a new challenge!
